requirement_topic.en: EMC — Electromagnetic Emissions and Immunity (AS/NZS / TTMRA)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——电磁辐射与抗扰度（AS/NZS / TTMRA）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——電磁輻射與抗擾度（AS/NZS / TTMRA）

summary.en: New Zealand does not maintain a standalone EMC regulatory framework equivalent to Australia's ACMA EMC framework. EMC requirements for consumer electronics and wireless devices in NZ are addressed through: (a) compliance with applicable AS/NZS standards (primarily AS/NZS CISPR 32 for emissions and AS/NZS CISPR 35 for immunity) as part of the controlled electrical device (CED) compliance pathway under the Electrical Safety Regulations 2010; and (b) Trans-Tasman Mutual Recognition Arrangement (TTMRA) alignment, under which Australian ACMA EMC compliance is recognised as satisfying equivalent NZ obligations. IEC CISPR-based test reports from accredited laboratories are accepted as evidence.
summary.zh: 新西兰没有与澳大利亚ACMA EMC框架相当的独立EMC监管框架。新西兰消费电子和无线设备的EMC要求通过以下途径解决：（a）遵守适用AS/NZS标准（主要为辐射的AS/NZS CISPR 32和抗扰度的AS/NZS CISPR 35），作为《电气安全法规》2010年下受控电气设备（CED）合规路径的一部分；（b）跨塔斯曼相互承认协议（TTMRA）协调，澳大利亚ACMA EMC合规被认可为满足等同的新西兰义务。获认可实验室出具的基于IEC CISPR的测试报告可作为证据。
summary.zht: 新西蘭沒有與澳洲ACMA EMC框架相當的獨立EMC監管框架。新西蘭消費電子和無線裝置的EMC要求透過以下途徑解決：（a）遵守適用AS/NZS標準（主要為輻射的AS/NZS CISPR 32和抗擾度的AS/NZS CISPR 35），作為《電氣安全法規》2010年下受控電氣裝置（CED）合規路徑的一部分；（b）跨塔斯曼相互承認協議（TTMRA）協調，澳洲ACMA EMC合規被認可為滿足等同的新西蘭義務。獲認可實驗室出具的基於IEC CISPR的測試報告可作為證據。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment electromagnetic emissions
Electrical Safety Regulations 2010 (ESR 2010) — CED compliance pathway

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for IT and multimedia equipment are governed by GB 9254 (radiated and conducted emissions for IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (conducted harmonic disturbance). Immunity requirements follow the GB/T 17626 series. These standards mirror IEC/CISPR publications but are mandatory as Chinese national standards for domestic market supply.
summary.zh: 中国IT和多媒体设备的EMC要求由GB 9254（IT设备辐射和传导发射）和GB 17625.1（传导谐波骚扰）管辖。抗扰度要求遵循GB/T 17626系列标准。这些标准以IEC/CISPR出版物为蓝本，但作为中国国家标准对国内市场供应具有强制性。
summary.zht: 中國IT和多媒體設備的EMC要求由GB 9254（IT設備輻射和傳導發射）和GB 17625.1（傳導諧波騷擾）管轄。抗擾度要求遵循GB/T 17626系列標準。這些標準以IEC/CISPR出版物為藍本，但作為中國國家標準對國內市場供應具有強制性。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — IT equipment electromagnetic emissions (China mandatory)
GB/T 17626 series — EMC immunity test methods

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 / GB 17625.1 test reports alone do not satisfy NZ EMC obligations. AS/NZS CISPR 32 or equivalent IEC CISPR 32 test reports from an accredited laboratory are the accepted evidence path for NZ. Australian ACMA EMC compliance (RCM) satisfies NZ TTMRA obligations and is the most efficient dual-market compliance path. A China-only EMC test report must be supplemented with AS/NZS or IEC CISPR equivalents.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254 / GB 17625.1测试报告单独不能满足新西兰EMC义务。获认可实验室出具的AS/NZS CISPR 32或等同IEC CISPR 32测试报告是新西兰认可的证据路径。澳大利亚ACMA EMC合规（RCM）满足新西兰TTMRA义务，是最高效的双市场合规路径。仅有中国EMC测试报告须补充AS/NZS或IEC CISPR等同报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254 / GB 17625.1測試報告單獨不能滿足新西蘭EMC義務。獲認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS CISPR 32或等同IEC CISPR 32測試報告是新西蘭認可的證據路徑。澳洲ACMA EMC合規（RCM）滿足新西蘭TTMRA義務，是最高效的雙市場合規路徑。僅有中國EMC測試報告須補充AS/NZS或IEC CISPR等同報告。

source.publisher: New Zealand Parliamentary Counsel Office / MBIE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NZ does not have a standalone EMC authority; AS/NZS CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 compliance via the CED pathway under ESR 2010 or Australian ACMA RCM (TTMRA) are the primary compliance routes. Chinese GB EMC test reports are not directly recognised and must be supplemented.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰没有独立EMC主管机构；通过ESR 2010下CED路径的AS/NZS CISPR 32/CISPR 35合规或澳大利亚ACMA RCM（TTMRA）是主要合规路径。中国GB EMC测试报告不直接被认可，须补充相应报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新西蘭沒有獨立EMC主管機構；透過ESR 2010下CED路徑的AS/NZS CISPR 32/CISPR 35合規或澳洲ACMA RCM（TTMRA）是主要合規路徑。中國GB EMC測試報告不直接被認可，須補充相應報告。

requirement_topic.en: CED — Voltage, Frequency, and Plug Type Compliance (230 V / 50 Hz / Type I)
requirement_topic.zh: 受控电气设备——电压、频率及插头类型合规（230V / 50Hz / I型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 受控電氣裝置——電壓、頻率及插頭類型合規（230V / 50Hz / I型插頭）

summary.en: New Zealand uses 230 V / 50 Hz AC power supply and Type I (Australian/NZ angled 3-pin flat blade) sockets, standardised under AS/NZS 3112. Consumer electronics and wireless/IoT devices supplied as controlled electrical devices (CEDs) under the Electrical Safety Regulations 2010 must be appropriate for NZ mains voltage and must be fitted with or supplied with a compliant Type I plug. Power supply units (PSUs) must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz operation or include a universal input (100–240 V). Devices must comply with AS/NZS 62368-1 (or AS/NZS 60950-1 where still applicable) for electrical safety.
summary.zh: 新西兰使用230V/50Hz交流电源及AS/NZS 3112标准化的I型（澳洲/新西兰斜三角三芯）插座。依据《电气安全法规》2010年作为受控电气设备（CED）供应的消费电子及无线/物联网设备须适用于新西兰市电电压，并须配备或随附符合规定的I型插头。电源适配器须额定适用于230V/50Hz或包含通用输入（100–240V）。设备须符合AS/NZS 62368-1（或在适用情况下仍适用AS/NZS 60950-1）的电气安全要求。
summary.zht: 新西蘭使用230V/50Hz交流電源及AS/NZS 3112標準化的I型（澳洲/新西蘭斜三角三芯）插座。依據《電氣安全法規》2010年作為受控電氣裝置（CED）供應的消費電子及無線/物聯網裝置須適用於新西蘭市電電壓，並須配備或隨附符合規定的I型插頭。電源適配器須額定適用於230V/50Hz或包含通用輸入（100–240V）。裝置須符合AS/NZS 62368-1（或在適用情況下仍適用AS/NZS 60950-1）的電氣安全要求。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3112 — Approval and test specification for plugs, socket-outlets and socket-outlet adaptors
AS/NZS 62368-1 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment — Safety requirements

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz AC power and GB 2099 / GB 1002-series plug and socket standards (primarily Type A flat two-pin and Type I angled two-pin; GB 1002 round-pin also used). Consumer electronics are rated for 220 V; power adapters for export may include universal input. CCC certification covers electrical safety under GB 4943.1 for in-scope IT equipment.
summary.zh: 中国使用220V/50Hz交流电源及GB 2099/GB 1002系列插头和插座标准（主要为A型扁平双芯和I型斜双芯；也使用GB 1002圆芯）。消费电子额定电压为220V；出口用电源适配器可包含通用输入。CCC认证涵盖适用范围内IT设备依GB 4943.1的电气安全。
summary.zht: 中國使用220V/50Hz交流電源及GB 2099/GB 1002系列插頭和插座標準（主要為A型扁平雙芯和I型斜雙芯；也使用GB 1002圓芯）。消費電子額定電壓為220V；出口用電源適配器可包含通用輸入。CCC認證涵蓋適用範圍內IT設備依GB 4943.1的電氣安全。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — IT equipment electrical safety (China mandatory for CCC-listed categories)
GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 — Chinese plug and socket standards
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/CQC, for applicable product categories)

gap.en: Chinese domestic products use 220 V / Type A or Type I (GB) plugs, which differ from NZ 230 V / Type I (AS/NZS 3112) angled plug standard. Chinese products supplied into NZ must be re-fitted or bundled with a compliant AS/NZS 3112 Type I plug; PSU must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz or universal input. CCC (GB 4943.1) is not recognised; AS/NZS 62368-1 compliance is required and must be evidenced in the SDoC.
gap.zh: 中国国内产品使用220V/A型或I型（GB）插头，与新西兰230V/I型（AS/NZS 3112）斜三角插头标准不同。供应新西兰的中国产品须更换为或附带符合AS/NZS 3112 I型插头；电源适配器须额定适用于230V/50Hz或通用输入。CCC（GB 4943.1）不被认可；须符合AS/NZS 62368-1要求，并在SDoC中提供证明。
gap.zht: 中國國內產品使用220V/A型或I型（GB）插頭，與新西蘭230V/I型（AS/NZS 3112）斜三角插頭標準不同。供應新西蘭的中國產品須更換為或附帶符合AS/NZS 3112 I型插頭；電源適配器須額定適用於230V/50Hz或通用輸入。CCC（GB 4943.1）不被認可；須符合AS/NZS 62368-1要求，並在SDoC中提供證明。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NZ requires 230 V / 50 Hz / Type I (AS/NZS 3112) plug compliance; Chinese domestic 220 V / Type A or non-AS/NZS plug configurations do not satisfy NZ CED requirements without modification. AS/NZS 62368-1 is the applicable safety standard; CCC is not accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰要求230V/50Hz/I型（AS/NZS 3112）插头合规；中国国内220V/A型或非AS/NZS插头配置若不经改造则不满足新西兰CED要求。AS/NZS 62368-1为适用安全标准；CCC不被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新西蘭要求230V/50Hz/I型（AS/NZS 3112）插頭合規；中國國內220V/A型或非AS/NZS插頭配置若不經改造則不滿足新西蘭CED要求。AS/NZS 62368-1為適用安全標準；CCC不被接受。
